name: MediaApiPkce
description: Configures OpenID Connect so the Media gallery/picker SPA can call the bearer-only Media API (api/media) with an OAuth2 authorization-code + PKCE access token. Enables the OpenID Server, Token Validation and Management features, turns on authorization-code flow with PKCE required, enables local (same-tenant) token validation for the 'Api' scheme, and registers a public (secret-less) PKCE client. The OpenIdServerSettings and OpenIdApplication steps are handled by the OpenID Server feature and OpenIdValidationSettings by the Validation feature, so they must stay after the feature step (a step with no registered handler is silently skipped). IMPORTANT: replace the RedirectUris/PostLogoutRedirectUris hosts (https://localhost:5001) with your tenant's real origin and the SPA callback paths built in Phase 1C, and make sure signed-in users have roles — the 'roles' scope carries them into the token, which the Media permission checks require.
author: The Orchard Core Team
